Off Calendar May-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruth Sullivan for and with Thomas Bernard and James Bernard (Co-Trustees).

Ms. Sullivan stated that the Co-Trustees were prepared to seek authorization to sell the property, that they were in the process of preparing the house for sale and that they hoped to have the petition on file by this week or the next. In addition, she stated that the house needed to be cleaned up, that some electrical work was needed and that the garage was occupied but that there were no tenants. The Parties also stated that they intend to invest the proceeds from the sale, keep some liquidity and that they need to work out a plan. The Court stated that it will be monitoring the sale of the property and the use of the funds to make sure that the Trustor's intent that Mark be taken care of is satisfied. The Court also spoke of Mark's dental needs, of making sure the funds are used for Mark's benefit to improve the quality of his life and stated that there should have been outright distribution of the real property to Mark at the time of the Mother's death. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). Status of filing of the petition for authortiy to sell real property was set for June 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Sullivan is to request a Monday hearing date.
